title: helictotrichon quadridentulum
intro: Helictotrichon quadridentulum, also known as Four-toothed Oat Grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an expectorant, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's health benefits include its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and prevent infection. Helictotrichon quadridentulum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
